steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of withholding tax rate from 13.5% to 15% for Nokia Oyj dividend under FI-NO treaty
Submit Vero Form 6163e/6167e refund application for EUR 3,607.50 excess withholding with Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement documentation
Provide custodian with treaty rate confirmation showing 15% limit applies to Norwegian residents on Finnish dividends
Escalate to Nordea's dividend processing team if initial contact does not resolve the EUR 3,607.50 overpayment within 10 business days

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
